BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 
LABEL: 
Reference Year 
DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the reference year of the enrollment data. 
LONG NAME: BENE_ENROLLMT_REF_YR 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
4 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
1999–current data year 
COMMENT: 
The data files are partitioned into calendar year files.
